text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with this exact title, published on the OpenAI blog in 2019, and the cited authors (Radford, Wu, Child, Luan, Amodei, Sutskever) exactly match the real authors. It is a well-known technical blog post (the GPT-2 paper), not indexed in traditional academic databases, which explains the automated checker failure.
LINK: https://cdn.openai.com/better-language-models/language_models_are_unsupervised_multitask_learners.pdf
